notes: Build complete. credentials.py implements the OS-keychain-first + encrypted-file fallback described in D052; auth.py generates install tokens, computes fingerprints, and provides constant-time check_request_token(). serve_platform.make_handler() takes a new enforce_install_token kwarg that main() sets to True on non-localhost. Redaction filter mounted at main() start-up so every log line goes through it. Tests: 117 new (40 credentials-security + 52 auth-security + 6 credentials-module + 6 auth-module + 13 auth-api). Full suite 974 -> 1091.
review_criteria: Verify threat model in company/legal/F006-secrets-at-rest.md is complete
Confirm no plaintext secret leaves the module in a log line
Confirm install-token gate on /api/* non-localhost respects the /api/auth/status exemption
